Name: Large size
Description:
Large size column allows to display long text, usually it’s for object name column

Object%20Table%20309374cae3fa8113b439c8bb096e0478.md
Dynamic Behaviour:
The Large size column weight in 4X. It’s responsible based on the screen size.
The minimum size is 320px.

Name: Medium size
Description:
Medium size column allows to display regular long text

Object%20Table%20309374cae3fa8113b439c8bb096e0478.md
Dynamic Behaviour:
The Medium size column weight in 2X. It’s responsible based on the screen size.
The minimum size is 160px.

Name: Small size
Description:
Small size column allows to display short text

Object%20Table%20309374cae3fa8113b439c8bb096e0478.md
Dynamic Behaviour:
The small size column weight in 1X. It’s responsible based on the screen size.
The minimum size is 80px.

Name: Fixed width
Description: Fixed width column allows to display non-dynamic length text (action, button or icon)
Dynamic Behaviour: The fixed width is based on the content length with 12px padding on each side. It won’t change width based on the screen size.
